title: Manufacturing Engineer - Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies:
Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
